heading: Licenses for radio officers
label: 7103 Licenses for radio officers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)710346:229a46:229b46:229gSection 7103 requires an applicant for a license as a radio officer to have, as a prerequisite, a first-class or second-class radiotelegraph operator license issued by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). It also excepts radiotelegraph operators that are engaged on Great Lakes vessels from the requirement of having to obtain a radio officer’s license.

children.label: a
children.text: A license as radio officer may be issued only to an applicant who has a first-class or second-class radiotelegraph operator license issued by the Federal Communications Commission.

children.label: b
children.text: Except as provided in , this part does not affect the status of radiotelegraph operators serving on board vessels operating only on the Great Lakes.section 7318 of this title
